compiled_state.title: E5: port bridge-status + purge-bridge in-process (rebar._cli over rebar._store), parity-pinned
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: E5 CODE COMPLETE (commit fd94e4b1, on main). bridge-status -> rebar._engine_support.bridge; purge-bridge -> rebar._commands.purge_bridge; routed via rebar._cli (auto-init full unless TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR set). Byte-parity dual-run tests test_e5_{bridge_status,purge_bridge}.py (10) green; full interfaces tier 469 passed. One documented divergence in purge: git commit-summary chatter suppressed (bash ran git commit w/o -q), matching E3 delete. NOT CLOSED: the LIVE-DIG Jira close-gate (per lad-cipher-arena standing gate) is satisfied jointly with E5b via one combined live DIG probe; pausing for user go-ahead before first live DIG write.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: E5 COMPLETE. bridge-status/purge-bridge in-process (commit fd94e4b1); 10 byte-parity tests + full interfaces tier green. These commands do not touch the Jira API surface (local .bridge-status.json read + local jira-* dir purge); the live-DIG close-gate attached to E5/E5b was the reconciler-rewire compatibility proof, satisfied by the E5b live DIG probe (DIG-5764 create->validate-all-fields->inbound->delete, zero residue; see ply-dag-skimp). Closing.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
